title: California Transport Sector Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q3 2025
content: With the expiration of the federal EV tax credit of up to $7,500 on September 30, 2025, Q3 2025 witnessed a surge in EV sales nationwide. However, YoY comparisons reflect a more tempered growth trend. All counties in California registered a rise in EV sales as a share of total LDV sales, both quarterly and annually, with San Mateo observing the highest YoY rise of over 13 percentage points.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
